$comment: Normatively defined by the AIP Gateway Protected Resource Metadata rules. This schema describes the RFC 9728 /.well-known/oauth-protected-resource document published by AIP-protected MCP gateways.
title: AIP Gateway Protected Resource Metadata
description: OAuth Protected Resource Metadata published at /.well-known/oauth-protected-resource by an MCP gateway that enforces AIP authentication.

resource.description: RFC 9728 protected resource identifier for the gateway.

authorization_servers.description: AIP Registry OAuth authorization-server issuer identifiers accepted for this gateway.

scopes_supported.description: AIP scope strings accepted by this protected resource.

bearer_methods_supported.description: RFC 9728 bearer token presentation methods. AIP gateways MUST support the HTTP Authorization header method.

dpop_signing_alg_values_supported.description: JWS algorithms accepted for DPoP proof JWTs. AIP DPoP profiles require EdDSA.

dpop_bound_access_tokens_required.description: Whether the protected resource always requires DPoP-bound access tokens.

tls_client_certificate_bound_access_toke.description: Whether the protected resource requires mutual-TLS client certificate-bound access tokens.

then.description: When DPoP-bound access tokens are required, EdDSA DPoP proof JWTs MUST be supported.
